summary: Social Live Delta Changes Testing - All features verified. (1) Feed 'Join Live' button: connectingToStream state implemented, button shows 'Joining...' text and faster pulse (animate-[pulse_0.5s]) during connecting, button disabled while connecting - VERIFIED via code review and Playwright. (2) Stories StoryCircle: isConnecting prop passed and used, enhanced pulse (animate-[pulse_0.4s]) and ring-4 effect during connecting - VERIFIED via code review. (3) WebSocket /api/ws/status endpoint returns connection counts - VERIFIED via API test. (4) WebSocket /ws/conditions and /ws/live endpoints defined in code - VERIFIED. (5) condition_reports.py imports and calls broadcast_new_condition_report - VERIFIED. (6) livekit.py imports and calls broadcast_live_status_change on start/end - VERIFIED.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or be deprecated (non-blocking, same as iteration_104)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all features verified via code review and Playwright)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Live delta changes verified: (1) Feed 'Join Live' button has connectingToStream state, shows 'Joining...' text and faster pulse (0.5s) during connecting, button disabled while connecting. (2) Stories StoryCircle has isConnecting prop, shows enhanced pulse (0.4s) and ring-4 effect during connecting. (3) WebSocket endpoints /ws/conditions and /ws/live are defined and /api/ws/status returns connection counts. (4) condition_reports.py broadcasts new reports via WebSocket. (5) livekit.py broadcasts live status changes on stream start/end.
